title: Chapter 12
content:
Chapter 12: [Ding!]

Liam returned home and freshened up right away, he had never thought about owning his own firm seriously until recently.

These law firms had such strict rules but Liam knew this could sway it to his advantage especially with the younger generation.

The archaic ways were no longer effective, and upholding it in the workplace was something that would stop true potential from shining through.

All it took for his future to be in jeopardy was a single post, that was it and it wasn’t even an incriminating one.

Liam opened up his laptop while the idea was still fresh, he wrote it all down, this included the estimated budget to set it all up.

It was already over a million dollars, and right away, Liam shut his laptop because this was an amount he didn’t have yet.

But it would be possible, he had roughly over $100,000 and it was either Rachel or Sophia he could spend it on.

However, Rachel was looking more likely considering he had already established an emotional connection with her.

This would make things easier as opposed to Sophia even though his system advised against spending too much on Rachel since she was classified as a low-tier MILF.

But hey, there was no such thing as bad profit and he could use Rachel to build up his wealth while he entertains Sophia.

[Ding!]

[Emotional Investment Alert!]

[Target: Rachel Kim (Low-Value MILF)]

[Status: Deteriorating Emotional Connection]

[Emotional Meter: Excellent 98%→39!]

Liam was shocked by the sudden drop, but this must be because he hadn’t checked in with her, if anything, he forgot.

Liam quickly picked up his phone and noticed he had forgotten to respond to her messages informing her that she had gotten home.

"Shit! She must think I only used her for her body!" Liam mumbled to himself right before calling her. He knew texting her wouldn’t be as effective since that window had closed.

Rachel’s phone rang a couple of times before being sent to voicemail, Liam didn’t give up and tried one more time.

Thankfully, Rachel picked up the phone but she sounded tired, like he had just interrupted something.

"Hey beautiful, I’m sorry I couldn’t get back to you earlier but I wanted to let you know I had a wonderful time yesterday," Liam began the conversation.

He said these words not only because he hoped it would maintain the emotional connection he had built up but also because he truly meant these words.

[[H-Hey Liam, I didn’t expect you to call...]]

He could feel the relief in her voice and Liam paid partial attention to see if a cyan screen would appear to inform him of any change.

"I would like to take you out again," Liam said and the cyan screen appeared right away.

[Ding!]

[Emotional Investment Alert!]

[Target: Rachel Kim (Low-Value MILF)]

[Status: Improving Emotional Connection]

[Emotional Meter: Excellent 39%→76%!]

"How about tonight?" Liam pressed on and there was a loud silence at the other end but he could hear her breathing.

[[I-I would love that.]]
